name: Point Dume Coastal Estate
description: Presented fully furnished, this highly secluded Point Dume retreat offers a rare blend of sophistication, privacy, and elevated coastal living. Meticulously renovated inside and out, the residence showcases exceptional craftsmanship, refined finishes, soaring ceilings, and sweeping ocean and mountain views throughout. Features include a grand two-story foyer, fireplace-adorned living room, formal dining room, family room with built-in bar, dual-sided aquarium, library/office, and a chef's kitchen with top-tier appliances. The upper level features five bedrooms highlighted by a spacious primary suite with ocean views, fireplace, private terrace, and spa-inspired bath. The lower level offers a private movie theater, gym, and secure safe room. Outdoor amenities include pool, spa, sun deck, built-in BBQ, fire pit lounge, and putting green.
vibe: Secluded coastal luxury with sweeping ocean and mountain views. Resort-like sophistication meets complete privacy.

name: Del Mar Coastal Contemporary
description: Newly rebuilt contemporary coastal home just 300 paces to the ocean in Del Mar. Steps from the sand in Del Mar Proper, this is one of the closest homes to Del Mar Beach and one of the very few properties permitted for short-term rentals. ADA-friendly with zero stairs from street, driveway, or garden. Expansive open-concept lower level features a supersized modern Italian kitchen with top-of-the-line oversized appliances, custom cabinetry, and dramatic entertaining space. Large openings lead to indoor-outdoor entertainment area with built-in seating, prep counters, and natural gas for BBQ and fire features. All four bedrooms are en-suite with bright, ultra-modern baths. Upstairs primary retreat offers two walk-in closets, spa-style bath, coffee/smoothie bar, and private ocean-view deck. Rear alley access provides parking for 7+ vehicles with potential ocean-view ADU expansion.
vibe: Contemporary coastal living steps from Del Mar Beach. ADA-friendly luxury with seamless indoor-outdoor flow and ocean views.

name: Merritt Drive Malibu Estate
description: Sprawling 3.25-acre hilltop Malibu estate with panoramic ocean, mountain, and treetop views. This 6-bedroom, 6-bathroom retreat features soaring 9-foot ceilings, beamed ceilings, sunken living room, open floor plan, and multiple fireplaces. Gourmet kitchen with marble counters, kitchen island, double oven, and pantry. Spa with mountain views, detached guest house with in-law suite, barn/stable, and room for a tennis court. Security features include automatic gate and alarm system. Indoor-outdoor living with French doors, balcony, and expansive grounds including front yard, back yard, and horse property. Built-in BBQ, bar with ice maker, and formal dining room for world-class entertaining.
vibe: Hilltop Malibu estate on 3.25 acres with panoramic ocean and mountain views. Complete privacy with guest house, barn, and room for a tennis court.

name: Lone Oak Ranch Estate
description: Stunning 12.52-acre ranch estate in Thousand Oaks with panoramic city and mountain views. This private retreat features 3 bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, a pool, fireplace, and tile roof on over 12 acres of rolling terrain. Perfect for events, productions, and gatherings up to 40 guests. The expansive grounds offer endless possibilities for outdoor filming, photo shoots, and private events with complete privacy and breathtaking vistas.
vibe: Sprawling 12-acre ranch with panoramic city and mountain views. Complete privacy for events and productions up to 40 guests.

name: Encino Mediterranean Estate
description: A stunning Mediterranean-style estate in the heart of Encino blending Spanish architectural elegance with modern luxury. This single-story residence features terracotta tile roofing, arched windows, and stucco walls that exude timeless SoCal charm. Inside, soaring ceilings with a grand chandelier anchor the formal living room, complemented by a fireplace, plush furnishings, and abundant natural light through floor-to-ceiling windows. The home includes a private screening room with reclining leather theater seating, a beautifully landscaped patio with outdoor lounge areas, and a swimming pool. Modern bathrooms with glass-enclosed showers and chrome fixtures complete this versatile production-ready property.

name: Fulton Modern
description: A sleek contemporary modern home featuring an open-concept living area with soaring high ceilings, polished concrete and hardwood flooring, and a crisp monochromatic white and gray color scheme throughout. The kitchen showcases high-gloss cabinetry while the bathroom features a sleek glass shower enclosure — all connected by recessed lighting and minimalist decor that create an effortlessly clean, production-ready aesthetic. White walls and wood accents complete the refined, camera-friendly interior.
vibe: Crisp minimalist modern with high ceilings and concrete-hardwood floors. Clean monochromatic palette ideal for editorial and commercial shoots.

name: Encino Stylish Home
description: A refined modern Spanish colonial residence featuring elegant arched doorways, terrazzo flooring, and soaring ceilings bathed in recessed light. The open floor plan connects a formal dining area and kitchen with built-in cabinetry, anchored by a prominent fireplace as the central focal point, while floor-to-ceiling windows ensure extraordinary natural light throughout. A manicured lawn with trimmed hedges and a classic beige stucco exterior deliver timeless curb appeal.
vibe: Modern Spanish colonial elegance with arched doorways, terrazzo floors, and a prominent fireplace. Flooded with natural light from floor-to-ceiling windows.

name: Dorilee Modern White
description: A striking modern white residence defined by clean architectural lines, minimalist design, and a bold two-material exterior — white siding on the lower level and stone/stucco on the upper level. Floor-to-ceiling windows ensure abundant natural light throughout while black accents create dramatic contrast against the white walls and hardwood flooring. The flat roofline, open front porch, and high-quality finishes complete the bright, airy, and thoroughly photogenic atmosphere.
vibe: Crisp modern white architecture with dramatic black accents. Abundant natural light and minimalist finishes create a bright, airy, camera-ready canvas.

name: Castaic Canyon Estate
description: A modern home with a clean neutral palette centered around a standout kitchen featuring stainless steel appliances, polished stone countertops, and a central island providing generous workspace. High-quality flooring and a spacious, open layout allow abundant natural light to pour in, creating a bright and welcoming atmosphere throughout. The contemporary aesthetic and versatile spaces make this property an ideal backdrop for production use.
vibe: Modern neutral-palette home with a chef's kitchen and polished stone surfaces. Bright and spacious with a welcoming, production-ready atmosphere.

name: Woodland Hills Private Oasis
description: A secluded residential retreat in Woodland Hills offering a true private oasis experience with dedicated outdoor space away from the bustle of the city. This property's intimate atmosphere and self-contained outdoor areas make it ideal for exclusive productions, private events, and retreat-style shoots. The private setting provides a rare sense of seclusion in the San Fernando Valley.
vibe: Secluded private oasis in Woodland Hills with dedicated outdoor space. Intimate and self-contained — perfect for exclusive productions and retreat-style shoots.

name: Knoll Drive Celebrity View
description: A prestigious multi-level home perched in the Hollywood Hills with commanding panoramic views of the city skyline and the iconic Hollywood landscape. View-oriented rooms throughout the property maximize the dramatic vistas, making every angle a cinematic backdrop for high-end productions and luxury events. This celebrity-caliber property offers the quintessential Los Angeles experience with unmatched visual impact.
vibe: Dramatic Hollywood Hills vantage point with commanding city and skyline views. Multi-level celebrity-caliber home ideal for premium productions and luxury events.

name: Blix Modern Toluca Lake
description: A clean, contemporary modern residence situated in the highly desirable Toluca Lake neighborhood, offering a refined aesthetic well-suited for film and photo productions. The property features quality finishes and a contemporary design throughout, providing a versatile and photogenic backdrop for a wide range of creative projects. Its Toluca Lake location places it moments from major studios and production facilities.
vibe: Clean contemporary modern in sought-after Toluca Lake. Studio-adjacent location with a refined, versatile interior ready for any production.

name: Otsego Mini Mansion
description: An impressive modern mini mansion in Sherman Oaks with bold contemporary design elements and quality finishes that command attention at every turn. The property's grand scale and striking architectural character make it an ideal canvas for high-production-value shoots, luxury events, and premium brand campaigns. Its distinctive modern aesthetic offers unique and versatile visual opportunities for film, television, and commercial productions.
vibe: Grand-scale modern mini mansion with bold contemporary architecture in Sherman Oaks. A striking, high-impact property ideal for premium productions and luxury events.

name: Winnetka Grand House
description: A well-maintained two-story home in Woodland Hills with a modern architectural style featuring clean lines, large windows, and a refined white and beige exterior clad in stone and stucco siding. Inside, hardwood floors, an updated kitchen with ample countertop space, and a contemporary staircase with modern railing create a bright and airy atmosphere throughout. The master bedroom with en-suite bathroom and a manicured landscaped lawn complete this excellent-condition property ready for production.
vibe: Excellent-condition two-story modern home with bright interiors, hardwood floors, and a manicured lawn. A versatile Woodland Hills backdrop for any production.
